infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: DriveSense needs your location to monitor geofenced safety zones and alert you when entering school or hospital zones.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: DriveSense needs your location for geofence safety monitoring.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: DriveSense monitors your location in the background to enforce speed limits in safety zones.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: DriveSense connects to your ELM327 OBD-II adapter via Bluetooth to read vehicle diagnostics.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Required to connect to ELM327 OBD-II Bluetooth adapters.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow DriveSense AI to use your location for geofenced safety monitoring.
